title: I'd Rather Be Rich
writer: Oscar Brodney, Norman Krasna, Leo Townsend
actors: Sandra Dee, Robert Goulet, Andy Williams
plot: A young heiress is summoned to the bedside of her dying grandfather. The man's last wish is to meet her fiance, but problems arise when the fiance is delayed and a young chemical engineer is persuaded to take his place. When the g...
